## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor / docs / tooling
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes. If you added an AWS service, note the catalog file. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, drop before/after screenshots or a short clip. Delete if N/A. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes (run `npm run format` to fix)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Snapshots reviewed — intentional changes updated with `npm run test:update`, no unexpected diffs
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Docs updated (`src/content/`) if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
